options.text: Of course! What are you most interested in — culture, food, or views?
You’re on your own. Everyone figures it out.

content.explanation: 正确答案用'Of course!'积极回应，并通过开放式问题引导需求，体现专业服务态度。选项1和4态度粗鲁，选项3虽提供帮助但缺乏互动，不符合'问候与开场'场景中建立信任的要求。
content.speakerText: Hello, I just arrived and I’m not sure where to start. Could you help me?
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，我刚到这儿，不知道从哪开始，能帮帮我吗？

content.scenarioHint: 游客刚到达一个城市，想礼貌地向旅游咨询员寻求推荐景点，同时表明自己时间有限。

options.text: Hi, I'm new here. Could you recommend some places I shouldn't miss? I only have one day.
What are the best spots in town? I don't care how long it takes.
I want to see everything. Tell me all the places right now.
Do you know any good restaurants? I'm really hungry.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了礼貌表达 'Could you recommend...' 并自然引入 'I'm new here' 和时间限制 'I only have one day'，符合问候与开场的交际目标。干扰项2语气生硬且忽略时间约束，干扰项3过于强硬且不礼貌，干扰项4偏离了询问景点的核心需求，属于答非所问。

content.scenarioHint: 游客在旅游信息中心，想礼貌请求帮助，强调自己是第一次来，希望获得适合初学者的推荐。

options.text: I'm visiting for the first time — I’d really appreciate some simple, must-see suggestions.
Where should I go? I don’t know anything about this city.
Can you just give me a map? I’ll figure it out myself.
Are you busy? I need to know about nightlife tonight.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了 'I'm visiting for the first time' 明确身份，并用 'I’d really appreciate...' 表达礼貌请求，同时 'simple, must-see suggestions' 符合初学者需求。干扰项2语气随意且缺乏礼貌，干扰项3直接拒绝帮助，不符合问候开场的互动期待，干扰项4突然转向夜生活主题，偏离了普遍景点推荐的场景核心。
